query:
SELECT
            date_trunc('hour', g) AS bucket,
            COALESCE(COUNT(t.id), 0)::bigint AS count
        FROM generate_series(
            date_trunc('hour', NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'),
            date_trunc('hour', NOW()),
            INTERVAL '1 hour'
        ) g
        LEFT JOIN threads t ON date_trunc('hour', t.created_at) = g
        GROUP BY bucket
        ORDER BY bucket
